title: Chatinia calyculata
taxonomy: Chatinia calyculata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Chatinia, which belongs to the order Gentianales. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The order Gentianales is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. Chatinia calyculata's classification reflects its close relationships with other plants in the Gentianales order.
